heading: Technical assistance
label: 4204 Technical assistance
text: The Secretary is encouraged to provide technical assistance to any State or unit of local government, or any nonprofit organization, as determined by the Secretary, that desires to develop programs or policies to limit the conversion of productive farmland to nonagricultural uses.
notes: Effective DateSection effective six months after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 22, 1981section 1549 of Pub. L. 97–98section 4201 of this title
